notes_extracted.content: 1,442 hotels comprising 347,301 rooms in 79 countries at Dec 31, 2024. 721 hotels in US (159,829 rooms). 149 all-inclusive resorts (55,708 rooms). Segment realignment in 2024. Transaction and integration costs reclassified to new line item.

policies.management_fees: Base fees as % of gross revenues; incentive fees based on hotel profitability. Recognized over time as services rendered.
policies.franchise_fees: Initial franchise fees combined with royalty fees and deferred; recognized over initial term. Ongoing royalty fees as % of gross room revenues.
policies.system_wide_services: Fund model — assessment fee billed monthly, revenue recognized over time. Intended to break-even but timing differences impact net income.
policies.loyalty_program: Assessment fee based on member expenditures. Revenue deferred until point redemption. Breakage estimated using third-party actuaries. Agent for managed/franchised hotels, principal for owned/leased.
policies.owned_and_leased: Room rental recognized daily. Other services recognized when provided. Presented net of sales/occupancy taxes.
policies.contra_revenue: Key money assets amortized to contra revenue over expected customer life (typically initial management/franchise agreement term).
policies.distribution: ALG Vacations — agent for most services (air, hotels, insurance, car rental). Principal for excursions.

notes_extracted.content: Consolidates majority owned and controlled subsidiaries plus VIE entities. All intercompany eliminated.

notes_extracted.trend: Declining — consistent with asset-light strategy (selling owned hotels)

notes_extracted.detail: $110M goodwill impairment in management/franchising segment reporting unit. Reporting unit goodwill balance $1,116M after impairment. Fair value estimated using weighted DCF + guideline public companies method.

notes_extracted.note_text: 2022 had $92M tax benefit. 2024 $267M provision driven by higher pre-tax income from real estate gains.

notes_extracted.accounting: Recorded in other assets, amortized to contra revenue over expected customer life (typically initial management/franchise agreement term)

notes_extracted.content: Form 8-K filed March 26, 2025 references Playa Hotels & Resorts tender offer (UVC Transaction). Acquisition activity in 2024 totaled $609M net of cash acquired.
